Encanto (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $96,093,622Details
International Box Office $160,693,120
Worldwide Box Office $256,786,742
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,609,213
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,284,222
Total $12,893,435
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The Madrigals are an extraordinary family who live hidden in the mountains of Colombia in a charmed place called the Encanto. The magic of the Encanto has blessed every child in the family with a unique gift — every child except Mirabel. However, she soon may be the Madrigals last hope when she discovers that the magic surrounding the Encanto is now in danger.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$27,206,494 (28.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.53 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:37.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,980 opening theaters/3,980 max. theaters, 7.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $112,787,117

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 24th, 2021 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: November 24th, 2021 (Wide) (United Kingdom)

November 24th, 2021 (Wide) (Netherlands)
November 24th, 2021 (Wide) (Belgium)
Video Release: December 24th, 2021 by Disney+
MPA Rating: PG for some thematic elements and mild peril.

Running Time: 109 minutes
Plot point: Sibling Rivalry
Release detail: Disrupted by 2020 COVID-19 pandemic

Genre:Adventure

Languages: English

Synopsis

The Madrigals are an extraordinary family who live hidden in the mountains of Colombia in a charmed place called the Encanto. The magic of the Encanto has blessed every child in the family with a unique gift — every child except Mirabel. However, she soon may be the Madrigals last hope when she discovers that the magic surrounding the Encanto is now in danger.
